name: §6Zombie
description:
§8Combat Pet

§7Health: §c100
§7Crit Damage: §930%

§6Bite Shield
§7Reduce the damage taken from
§7zombies by §a25%§7.

§6Rotten Blade
§7Deal §a150% §7more damage to §2༕ Undead
§7mobs

§6Living Dead
§7Increases all stats on §2Undead ༕
§7armor by §a20%§7.

§eRight-click to add this pet to your
§epet menu!

variants.name: Zombie Skeleton Horse Skin
variants.lore:
§8Consumed on use

§7Pet skins change the look and
§7particle trail of your pet but only
§7one skin can be active at a time!

§7This skin can only be applied to
§aSkeleton Horse§7 pets.

§eRight-click on your summoned pet to
§eapply this skin!
